brand_dna.category: Outdoor-inspired headwear brand selling premium trucker and lifestyle hats built around national parks, fishing, fraternities, states, and iconic outdoor themes.
brand_dna.core_belief: Tailgate Hats is about helping people express who they are and where they feel most at home - one hat at a time, through original artwork and thoughtful design.
proof_points: Built on industry-best suppliers including Richardson, YP Classics, and Flexfit
One-year quality and fit guarantee plus a 60-day no-hassle return policy
Hats double-wrapped in tissue and butcher paper, shipped in rigid corrugated boxes
Ships from a Portland, Oregon warehouse within 24 to 48 hours
brand_dna.positioning: Well-crafted, original-artwork headwear at attainable prices - quality-driven but accessible, not luxury and not bargain-bin.

voice_pillars.name: At Home Outside
voice_pillars.desc: Speaks to people who live outdoors, tying product to identity and place rather than just features.
voice_pillars.quote: Designed for people who feel most at home outside

voice_pillars.name: Quality-Confident
voice_pillars.desc: States clearly it stands behind materials and fit, using guarantees as proof rather than hype.
voice_pillars.quote: we stand behind our one-year quality guarantee

voice_pillars.name: Warm And Helpful
voice_pillars.desc: Personal, service-first tone that invites questions and treats buyers like a crew, not a cart.
voice_pillars.quote: always happy to help you find the right hat for you or your whole crew

voice_pillars.name: Craft-Focused
voice_pillars.desc: Leans on original artwork, thoughtful design, and detail to signal care in every hat.
voice_pillars.quote: hats meant to be worn confidently every day

phrases: built for all-day comfort and everyday wear
for you or your whole crew
ready to ship or the ability to add a custom touch

icp: Outdoor-minded men and women who value original design, comfort, and craftsmanship, and buy hats that signal their identity and favorite places at an attainable price.

personas.name: Parks And Trails Regular
personas.description: Hikers and outdoor lovers who buy national park and fishing designs to represent the places they feel most at home - moved by original artwork and everyday comfort.

personas.name: Greek Life Buyer
personas.description: Fraternity members outfitting themselves or the whole chapter, moved by chapter-specific designs, group ordering, and attainable per-hat pricing.

personas.name: Local Pride Wearer
personas.description: State and regional buyers repping where they live, drawn to distinctive designs, quality guarantees, and fast shipping.

offers: Take $10.00 off any 2 regular price hats
Take $20.00 off any 3 regular price hats
Free shipping on all orders over $24.00 (promo; normal flat rate around $3.00-$3.50)
60-day no-hassle return policy with free returns and exchanges
Custom / batch ordering available for groups

allowed.claim: 60-day no-hassle return policy with free shipping on returns and exchanges.
One-year quality and fit guarantee on our hats.
We use suppliers including Richardson, YP Classics, and Flexfit.
Orders ship from our Portland, Oregon warehouse within 24 to 48 hours.
Free shipping on orders over $24 within the lower 48 states (while promo runs).
Hats are double-wrapped in tissue and butcher paper and shipped in rigid corrugated boxes.

banned.claim: "The best guarantee available" as a factual superlative.
banned.why: FTC substantiation - unqualified superlative that cannot be objectively proven; keep guarantee terms factual instead.

banned.claim: "The best hats" or "#1 outdoor headwear brand."
banned.why: FTC - unqualified superlative and ranking claim with no substantiation.

banned.claim: Invented review counts, star ratings, or endorsements.
banned.why: No customer reviews were found; fabricating social proof violates FTC endorsement rules.

banned.claim: Fake urgency such as "only 3 left" or countdown timers not tied to real inventory.
banned.why: FTC prohibits invented urgency and false scarcity.

banned.claim: "Guaranteed to last forever" or lifetime durability promises.
banned.why: FTC - guaranteed-results claim beyond the stated one-year quality guarantee.

banned.claim: Implying official partnership with the National Park Service or Smokey Bear beyond licensed use.
banned.why: FTC - deceptive affiliation/endorsement claim without documented authorization.
